target:
Why is Shinpei here!?
You're back!?

(There's only one of its kind
Ushio's belongings… This thing…!!)

Ushio is dead…!!
I-It was the day before yesterday…

I'm alive, right?
Look! I'm right here!

(This is a shadow!!
There's no mistake!!)

I-Is this…?
What happened to you…?
Don't you remember!?

Don't you get it…?
What happened before coming here…

It's amazing…
I remember the pain…

In the water…
My vision got darker and darker…

I see…
I must have died…
A ghost…but I have real legs…

(This…this person…
Really thinks they're Ushio?
What's going on--)

The last thing I thought was…
I wanted to see you again…

I wanted to say something
If I could see you again.

(This…this person just said…
Like!?
What does that mean!?)

You…what!?
What are you talking about!?

It feels…weird…
My head's all fuzzy…

(Don't let yourself be fooled!!
Get a grip, me!)

(Ushio was placed in the coffin
the day before yesterday.
The three of us, Alain and Mio and I---
we pressed the incineration switch.)
(Ushio is ashes now. She's not in this world anymore.)

(Pretending to be Ushio…!
What's your goal!?)
…<color=#GF_TIPS_069>you</color>, what did you come here for!?
That's what I want to ask you…

When you die…
Don't you go to God's place…?

What's your goal!?
What do you want!?

Shinpei…that fireworks…
It can't be today is the 24th…!?
I want to go to the festival with Shinpei!!
